&Schema = !'dbo' &DatabaseName = !'BASE_ROLIVEIRA' AuditplusGetDatastoreParms.Call(!'Default',!'DuplicatasPagamento', &ServerName, &DatabaseName, &Schema) &AuditSchema = !'auditplus' &AuditDatabaseName = !'BASE_ERPAUDIT' AuditplusGetDatastoreParms.Call(!'AuditPlus',!'AuditRecord', &AuditServerName, &AuditDatabaseName, &AuditSchema)
Do Case Case &operation = !'DRP' Do 'Drop' Case &operation = !'INS' Do 'Insert' Case &operation = !'UPD' Do 'Update' Case &operation = !'DLT' Do 'Delete' EndCase
Sub 'Drop' &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditDuplicatasPagamentoInsert]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditDuplicatasPagamentoUpdate]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"DROP TRIGGER [%1].[AuditDuplicatasPagamentoDelete]", &Schema) + NewLine()
EndSub
Sub 'Insert' &auditData += format(!"CREATE TRIGGER [%1].[AuditDuplicatasPagamentoInsert]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += format(!"ON [%1].[DuplicatasPagamento]", &Schema) + NewLine() &auditData += !"AFTER INSERT" + NewLine() &auditData += !"AS" + NewLine() &auditData += !"BEGIN" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() &auditData += !"SET NOCOUNT ON;" + NewLine() &auditData += NewLine() @AuditRecordLastId decimal(10,0)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastTableId VarChar(36)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @RecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @ParentRecordKeys VarChar(410)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @EmpCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @FilCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @CreCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE @CrePagCod_Inserted NUMERIC(38)" + NewLine() &auditData += !"DECLARE Cursor_Inserted_Records CURSOR FOR SELECT EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, CrePagCod, CrePagTip, CrePagDta, CrePagVlr, CreMovCod, CreMovItmCod, CrePagVlrJur, CrePagVlrDsc, CrePagVlrTar, NewLine() &auditData += !"SELECT @UserNameVar = username, @AuditRecordSessionId = sessionid, @AuditRecordLastId = auditid, @AuditRecordLastTableId = tableid, @AuditRecordLastRecordKeys = recordkeys, NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordSessionId = CAST(NEWID() as VarChar(36))" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastId = 0" + NewLine() &auditData += !"SET @AuditRecordLastTableId =
